{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321222423FFA211FE48A7353085A2"}"},"total":840},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7063586163881575176","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"被推荐来的，还是无女主+宠物系统，心动了，主角三观也正，一看，怀疑我和作者其实是异父异母的亲兄弟？心有灵犀，不论是各种走向还是主角的发展，都太符合我的内心想法了w其实慢慢来写挺好的，不然主线推太快就不太会有人上心看了，不过作者想怎么写我都接受啦w真的辛苦啦，好不容易找见喜欢的小说，请你一定要加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1644619321,"group_id":"7002923785481358351","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"𓆩 ❤︎ 𓆪","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5yb+bITxM+h/8XfcjN0Aqrd0RwZwV6aTnkBltH7HHnK","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e8fc17a2dcb6471d95401276f793fc5a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621371&x-signature=cKxVZ6kI0ktOxuJm5A0FQ27frFU%3D","user_id":"1970801002686279","user_name":"一点都不妙的妙妙屋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1970801002686279","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1646075149,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7002923785481358351","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+搞笑+山海经异兽】
22 世纪异能觉醒，次元裂缝却不断撕开现实世界的防线。
叶林是异能圈里的 “笑话”—— 别人控雷裂空，他的异能只够招猫逗狗，鸟雀总落头顶筑巢，人送外号 “树杈精”。
一次次元空间内，他却意外觉醒【山海经系统】。
从此，他转职啦！
成为召唤师，不管是上古凶兽饕餮，还是神话故事中的九尾狐，亦或是火神之侍毕方，都能为他而战！
少年成为了华夏投入其他势力的一颗炸药包
好一根搅屎棍啊！
因为他不是在搞事，就是在去搞事的路上！
【无女主，但是有女性角色，有青梅竹马，但是不会谈恋爱哈，主直男一枚，注孤生！】
【主没有一言不合就虾仁的特殊癖好，只有触及底线才会动手，系统也不是无敌系统，对主会有考验，但后期存在感会减弱，喜欢看暗黑爽文的回避】
【前期搞笑苟发育，后期崛起，主要敌对势力不在华夏，有打赌、家世、打脸的老梗，部分反派会脸谱化，不喜误入】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/8c0ae62510f9d65f29e5acaac0294c12~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"骨头丫丫","author_id":"","book_id":"7002923785481358351","book_name":"你在山海经哪一页","book_short_name":"山海经召唤","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#384040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2408人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7002924619938300457","read_count":"2408","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1306285"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"406","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,神豪,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/8c0ae62510f9d65f29e5acaac0294c12~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779287063&x-signature=88%2F6VEK5S2K73BYegQUmMS2fFvo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109056737752","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.8085023e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321222423FFA211FE48A7353085A2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":29,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1361,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":49445,"re
